name: Exorcist
short_description: You are an exorcist tasked with completing a ritual under the threat of malevolent spirits. This game features no narrative and plays like a hide-and-seek game with additional rules.
detailed_description:
In this game, you take on the role of a exorcist to complete a ritual. As the spirits struggle and various sinister disruptions arise, you must hold your ground until the ritual is complete and successfully banish them.

Game Duration

You can choose your game duration at the start:

  • 5 minutes

  • 15 minutes

  • 20 minutes

Duration selection does not affect achievement unlocking.

Game Features

  • Spirit Pursuit

    Wandering vengeful ghosts will attempt to capture you, testing your courage and strategy.

  • Toy Destruction

    Spirit-controlled dolls will try to sabotage the barrier—you must act quickly to stop them.

  • Diverse Disruptions

    A variety of minor and major disturbances keep the tension and challenge levels high.

  • Narrative-Free Focus

    A pure game-play experience that dives straight into the core fun.

Modes & Maps

Easy Mode

  • Faster stamina recovery.

  • Only one doll on the field, reducing difficulty.

Hard Mode

  • Offers additional collection achievements for hardcore players seeking deeper satisfaction.

Explore two distinct maps, each with unique styles and experiences.

Controls

  • Move: WADS

  • Run: Left Shift

  • Crouch: C

  • Investigate/Interact: Left Mouse Button

  • Exit Investigation: Right Mouse Button
